title: What the hell did I just see
display_title: What the hell did I just see
wikitext:
[]: What the hell did I just see...             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Aug 30, 2005 9:27 am http://www.gainax.co.jp/ If you scroll down and look to the right, you see a evangelion magazien add.... Does anyone wana tell me what seems very wrong with it? please correct me if I'm mistaken :evil: BUT IS GAINAX MAKING EVA HENTAI!!!! like come on isnt there enough of that out there? please dear god tell me anno didnt aprove this wish I could read the Japanese words though. Anyways I thought I'd bring it up for a laugh and see some opinion and clearify wtf that thing was

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Aug 30, 2005 9:41 am Isn't that the stripping instrumentality project or something like that? A book in which on the pages you'll see the character in the same pose, but on every image with less clothes.

[]:             Quote Post by techiet » Tue Aug 30, 2005 10:05 am Yeah, I think it is. Looks like they got all the official Eva hentai (1999-2003) and smacked in a hardcover book to make more money off fans. Semi-related: Two more Eva related MP3 players As if the Nerv iPod wasn't enough xD I can't read Japanese, but are the Eva soundtracks included? Considering the mp3 player's cost about $535~

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Aug 30, 2005 11:57 am ooooooh i want one! not the porn, but the mp3 players

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 30, 2005 12:30 pm Gainax has been making Eva hentai for a while. Nothing hardcore, nothing animated. Mostly tasteful from what I've seen. On further inspection, the item in question is a Telephone Card Book. I don't know what exactly that means, but that's supposedly what it is. I've seen these illustrations elsewhere as a calendar, they're not bad illustrations. But, yeah, it is a bit dissapointing to see Gainax making Eva hentai. I can deal with the echi stuff, but actual hentai is dissapointing to see. Just be glad it isn't hardcore.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Aug 30, 2005 2:57 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Gainax has been making Eva hentai for a while. Nothing hardcore, nothing animated. Mostly tasteful from what I've seen.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Aug 30, 2005 3:20 pm Tasteful? Hentai? Isn't that a contridiction in terms?

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Tue Aug 30, 2005 3:48 pm Hardcore or not. I would get it if I could. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by The Sandman » Tue Aug 30, 2005 5:24 pm I do have to say this. Misato sure have "interesting tase" in underwear. :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Aug 30, 2005 8:37 pm IIRC some time ago Gainax did release a set of ecchi telephon cards, right?

[]:             Quote Post by pHasE _4! » Wed Aug 31, 2005 2:33 am Naughty but nice!! Ha Ha I do agree that moving towards hentai type stuff does kind of discredit the characters. I mean, moving away from a really good piece of anime & then confusing it with smutt. Its kinda wrong. :x I must say however that it is what you were kind of looking for in the anime but just didnt get to see it. By the way...is eva like suppose to be everlasting. Its been 10 years down the line already & they still producing stuff? They should give us another 26 episodes in my opinion if they gonna keep Eva alive. They would have mor than enough to write about.

[]:             Quote Post by The Sandman » Wed Aug 31, 2005 2:45 am pHasE_4! wrote: By the way...is eva like suppose to be everlasting? It's been 10 years down the line already & they still producing stuff? They should give us another 26 episode in my opinion if they gonna keep Eva alive. They would have more than enough to write about.

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Wed Aug 31, 2005 4:04 am I sure do need to get my hands on some Eva hentai.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Aug 31, 2005 4:37 am are you sure it'll be the hentai your hands will be on

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Aug 31, 2005 12:45 pm LoL I really find this very amusing. but also very very wrong XD as they say sex sells and i guess gainax wands more money... sigh dont we all XD

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Wed Aug 31, 2005 1:38 pm The Sandman wrote: pHasE_4! wrote: By the way...is eva like suppose to be everlasting? It's been 10 years down the line already & they still producing stuff? They should give us another 26 episode in my opinion if they gonna keep Eva alive. They would have more than enough to write about.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Aug 31, 2005 1:56 pm I think as much as I'd like to see more eva its not going to happin.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Sep 01, 2005 9:29 am Gatta say I hope they never make any new eva things unless its by anno himself. I base this on my experiance with ghost in the shell, great movies but the series had a differnt director, and this director was a huge fan boy which just takes away from the story and opinions of the original director.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Thu Sep 01, 2005 10:25 am is everyone choosing to forget the prequel? i know it's just a rumour, but as was said "gainax must want more money" too convenient to let it pass undone. if they've resorted to hentai, i'm sure they wouldn't mind.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Sep 01, 2005 10:47 am My gut tells me that the prequle will either not happin or not happin with anno. If im right on that I dont think i'll even see it.
